title: Texture and Grain Boundary Network Evolution of Laser Powder Bed Fusion Processed Pure Ni During Post-printing Annealing

condition.process: Laser powder bed fusion (EOS M400-1, 40um layer)

post_anneal.below_900C: Modest grain growth (~10%), ~15% increase in low energy (111) boundaries
post_anneal.above_1000C: Static recrystallization, equiaxed grains, Sigma3/Sigma9 boundaries >5x increase, (111) boundaries 5x increase, texture strength decrease >50%

summary_zh: 退火温度<900°C时组织变化温和；>1000°C时静态再结晶主导，通过孪晶机制显著弱化织构(>50%)并大幅增加低能晶界比例。

title: Formation of Twins and Stacking Faults during the Primary Recrystallization of Pure Nickel

condition.note: 厚度依赖的再结晶温度 (bulk vs thin foil)

post_anneal.key_finding: 退火孪晶形成强烈依赖形变织构，TEM原位观察

summary_zh: 冷轧纯镍再结晶中退火孪晶的形成取决于形变织构，薄膜样品再结晶温度显著高于块体。
